reviews.review_msg: It took me 15 minutes to watch 5 minutes of a lecture because of how hard it is to understand her. You can imagine how long it took to watch an entire lecture. Would be cool if she had captions but nope! Having the final be worth 60% is insane for a 100 level course. She also takes forever to respond to her emails so gl if you need any help.

I really enjoyed this subject and found all of the information fascinating. She can be a tough grader, but gives excellent feedback for improvement. I feel it would have been beneficial to have more small quizzes rather than a large midterm as it was so information heavy

If you want to understand the course you cant she has an accent and there are 40 different species and all of them sound like shsjskngkajwhjnfk. you spend more time trying to understand a sentence she says than you do studying

Biggest issue is a 40/60 grading system (40 midterm, 60 final) and the fact she tends to do trick Qs on the tests ESPECIALLY for T/F Qs. It's basically just memorization, I studied for 8 hrs the day before the final and 4 hrs the day of and it felt way better than the midterm. At least I found the info interesting or I would have been screwed

She is so kind and knowledgeable. The material for this course is fascinating but a 40%- 60% grading system is unfair. Only take this class if u really find the material interesting cause her exams are tricky. But overall very good professor.

A background in biology is needed. ARCH131 with Angela - the worst class if you are looking for easy electives. She disrespects and mocks religion. 150 questions for the final. Every question is super tricky. She gives you a sentence that seems right by 95%, but then adds only one word to make it wrong. She does not test if students have knowledge.

Mark for an A- is 92%, stricter than most courses. Your mark is determined by 2 tests and 3 quizzes. Lectures are mostly borrowed from a previous professor. Information is fairly interesting, with a few documentary films thrown in as class material. Would be a class worth recommending if the grading was not so strict.

The grading system she uses is different from what sfu suggests for some reason, your 91% is treated as a B+!!!! She also takes soo long to respond to your emails sometimes days.   Take Arch 100 or Arch 101 instead, materials are similar but the profs and grading would be better.
Easy course. Strict with everything, bad with emails

100% my fav prof ever. So sweet and genuinely cares about her students. Tough marker and tests are HARD she says they are easy - they are not. But super accommodating and other assignments will keep your grade up. very organized class. if you don't care about the topic she's teaching don't take the course, it wont be a GPA booster
Might be my favourite class at university so far. If you can take a class with her do it!
